rule: Every escaped regression or near miss must identify the missed signal and add or strengthen a test, fixture, monitor, or release rule before closure.

records.summary: A draft Gardens by the Bay closure overlay selected the adjacent eastern road loop instead of the shoreline segment.
records.missedSignal: The closure generator had aggregate length checks but no fixture for exact endpoints and marker length-midpoint.
records.prevention: tests/node/closure-route.test.mjs locks both shoreline endpoints and proves the accepted warning marker remains on that exact route.
